name: Telegram Mini App docs and harness foundation
description: Create the durable docs, routing updates, execution plan, and phased harness rollout records needed before implementing a Telegram Mini App client on top of the existing worker and product model.

planned: Used `using-skills` first and classified the work as Level 2 because it changes durable docs structure, product-spec routing, frontend/backend reference routing, plan artifacts, and harness rollout state.
Used `grill-with-docs` before writing the plan because the TMA brief had repo-truth conflicts around package names, auth boundary wording, and client-surface scope.
Checked current Telegram Mini App docs and package pages on 2026-06-01 to pressure-test launch-mode, storage, and package-namespace assumptions before writing repo truth.
artifacts: Added `docs/design-docs/telegram-mini-app-client-architecture.md` as the durable home for TMA client architecture and native-bridge policy.
Added `docs/product-specs/telegram-mini-app.md` and updated current auth/invite/quick-add specs so TMA maps cleanly onto existing product behavior.

Added `docs/TMA.md`, `docs/references/tma/app-structure-and-client-rules.md`, and `docs/references/tma/auth-and-bot-pattern.md`, then routed them from `AGENTS.md`, `docs/FRONTEND.md`, `docs/BACKEND.md`, and `docs/references/index.md`.

Added the completed ExecPlan, updated `docs/exec-plans/index.md`, updated `ARCHITECTURE.md`, seeded `feat-079` through `feat-085`, updated `harness/feature_index.json`, and logged progress in `harness/progress.md`.

2026-06-02 follow-up expanded the TMA leaf-doc set with native UI/navigation, state/storage, and development/hardening guides, and refreshed the existing TMA rules to reflect newer Telegram package, storage, and launch-surface guidance.

2026-06-02 terminology follow-up standardized the router and reference paths to `TMA`/`tma`, renamed the planned runtime app path to `apps/tma`, and removed old direct alternate-package mentions from the repo docs.
verification: Node JSON.parse validation passed for `harness/feature_index.json` and all new `harness/features/feat-078..085.json` files.
`git diff --check` passed with no whitespace errors.

2026-06-02 review follow-up resolved leftover harness merge markers and added the TMA leaf docs, exec plan, and feature records to Git so the branch diff includes the files routed by the updated docs.

2026-06-02 docs-guideline follow-up re-checked current Telegram Mini Apps docs for package migration, `startapp`/`startattach`, launch-context auth, test environment, and Bot API 9.0/9.1 capability notes before updating the TMA leaf docs.
Final `gitnexus_detect_changes(scope: all, repo: household-finance-system)` was run before completion reporting.

notes: This feature creates the docs and rollout structure only. It does not add `apps/tma` runtime code yet.
